abort.already_configured: Entity Failover is already configured. Add new failover entities from the integration page.

user.title: Create failover entity
user.description: Select at least two source entities from the same domain. Their order is the failover priority.

data.name: Failover entity name
data.recovery_stability: Stability delay before returning to a higher-priority source
data.failure_cooldown: Temporary exclusion duration after a failure
data.repairs_delay: Delay before showing a Repairs alert

data_description.sources: The first available source is used. If it fails, Entity Failover switches to the next one.
data_description.recovery_stability: A higher-priority source must stay available for this long before becoming active again.
data_description.failure_cooldown: After a command error, the failed source is ignored for this long.
data_description.feature_policy: Choose whether the entity exposes only features shared by every source, or features from the active source.
data_description.command_validation: Determines when a command counts as successful and when another source should be tried.
data_description.repairs_delay: Set to 0 to keep the unavailable state only and never create a Repairs alert.

error.too_few_sources: Select at least two source entities.
error.duplicate_sources: The same source cannot be selected more than once.
error.mixed_domains: All sources must belong to the selected domain.
error.self_reference: The failover entity cannot use itself as a source.
error.circular_dependency: This source order would create a circular dependency.
error.incompatible_device_class: The selected sources have incompatible device classes.
error.incompatible_state_class: The selected sources have incompatible state classes.
error.incompatible_unit_of_measurement: The selected sources have incompatible units.

error.circular_dependency: This source order would create a circular dependency.
error.incompatible_device_class: The selected sources have incompatible device classes.
error.incompatible_state_class: The selected sources have incompatible state classes.
error.incompatible_unit_of_measurement: The selected sources have incompatible units.

all_sources_unavailable.title: {name} has no available source
all_sources_unavailable.description: All configured source entities are unavailable or excluded: {sources}.

clear_failures.name: Retry excluded sources
clear_failures.description: Clear temporary source exclusions and immediately recalculate the active source.

options.service_call: Retry if the service call fails
